_comment: Example MCP server registration for mytools-osint. Paste the `mcpServers` block into your AI agent's MCP config: Claude Code uses ~/.claude/mcp.json (or .claude/mcp.json per-project), Warp Agents uses ~/.warp/mcp.json, Cursor uses ~/.cursor/mcp.json.

_alternatives._comment: If the `osint` console script is not on PATH, invoke via the Python module directly.
